title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Housing.com International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Housing.com International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com International Enterprises family as a Backend Developer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!
